one_line: Real GNU Makefile with 11 targets (test/eval/eval-smoke/eval-frontier/train/train-smoke/generate-scenarios/validate-scenarios/figures/clean/help) wired to actual repo commands (rex.eval_pass_at_k, pytest, build_incidents.py, rex.chart, train_rft.py); validated by make -n on every target plus real runs of make test (93 passed) and make validate-scenarios (32/32).
